top_wedges.wedge: Attribution-first 90-day pilot with PMS/booking-engine integration, Swiss-hosted option, and weekly owner-ready action reports proving direct-booking uplift.
Turn scattered review, pricing and booking data into a single weekly action pack that measurably lifts direct bookings while saving the small team time.
Weekly decision engine that turns compset, review, and booking signals into 5 prioritized actions with ready-to-use FR/EN copy — replacing manual spreadsheets and avoiding an additional hire.

top_blockers.blocker: Owner/Finance proof gate on measurable attribution plus GDPR/Swiss-hosting legal review and IT integration windows.
PMS/CRS integration dependencies plus owner risk aversion without Swiss references and a contractual performance safeguard.
Owner risk aversion combined with limited team bandwidth; if execution lags or attribution is unclear, recurring SaaS spend will be delayed or declined.

top_wedges.wedge: Low‑risk, Swiss‑hosted 90‑day pilot focused on direct share shift and clearer weekly decisions (no auto‑pricing), mapped to replacing agency/content and overlapping reputation spend; backed by Swiss luxury references.

A Swiss‑hosted, PMS‑integrated 90‑day pilot during a shoulder season that consolidates compset alerts + review intelligence into a single weekly action plan, proving reduced OTA commission and ~+5% direct revenue while replacing fragmented agency/reporting time.

Turn scattered data into a single weekly commercial action plan that demonstrably lifts direct revenue, while reducing agency/content spend and enhancing compset intelligence—proven via a de-risked 90-day pilot.

top_blockers.blocker: Owner/Revenue risk aversion to algorithmic pricing without strong Swiss luxury references and performance assurances, plus overlap/term constraints with existing vendors and IT/legal review time.
Owner/CFO reluctance to approve a recurring CHF 5k SaaS without Swiss luxury references, firm SLAs, and clear attribution; integration/legal reviews can further stall timelines.
Procurement/IT/legal friction around data security, Swiss hosting, and PMS/CRS integrations, plus perceived overlap with the RMS/reputation stack.

top_wedges.wedge: Pilot-backed weekly decision engine that replaces spreadsheets/agency tasks, integrates with PMS to prove 5–8% direct uplift, and complies with Swiss/GDPR hosting.
Offer a Swiss-hosted, PMS-integrated 60–90 day pilot that delivers one weekly action plan and targets a +7–10% direct uplift, backed by Swiss reference calls and a clear ROI scorecard.

top_blockers.blocker: Owner/finance signoff combined with execution bandwidth and proof-of-attribution demands.
CFO/Owner reluctance to add recurring opex without hard ROI and the hidden implementation load/cost of PMS integration and team time.
Attribution uncertainty (seasonality and channel-mix confounders) plus integration complexity/costs and owner skepticism of recurring OPEX.

top_wedges.wedge: Clear weekly commercial actions + multilingual content that replaces agency/junior hire time

top_blockers.blocker: Integration complexity with PMS/booking engine and owner’s caution on recurring spend creating extra workload without clear attribution
Statistical attribution and seasonality noise with only 10 rooms, making ROI proof within 3–6 months hard to trust.

top_wedges.wedge: Lead with a Swiss-hosted 60–90 day pilot tied to PMS/BE integration and a weekly 3-action decision pack (<3 hours/week). Commit to clear attribution of direct revenue and provide Lucerne/Swiss references. Include seasonal pricing or credits if KPIs aren’t met.

Time-saving weekly action list plus multilingual review/content engine, proven on a Swiss boutique reference, delivered via a 60–90 day pilot with minimal IT and simple attribution (codes/call-tracking).

top_blockers.blocker: Owner/finance conservatism on recurring SaaS and data/privacy gatekeeping for PMS/BE access
Head of Finance demanding provable attribution and clarity on integration costs/effort; risk that limited staff capacity undermines execution and ROI.
No current direct-booking engine and owner’s caution on recurring spend; small absolute ROI after fees in a 24-room, seasonal property.
